mission.title: opentofu: Implement State Encryption
mission.description: Implement State Encryption. Requested by 22+ users.

steps.title: Check OpenTofu installation
steps.description:
Verify your OpenTofu version:
```bash
tofu version
```
This feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/.

steps.title: Understand the feature context
steps.description:
Issue to track the implementation of #874 

## Subtasks

steps.title: Apply the fix for Implement State Encryption
steps.description:
This PR, when ready, will close the first subtask of

- configuration data structures 
- configuration handling
- external interface and top-level functions to allow parallelization of the development effort

Specification and approved RFC see #874 

Subtasks planning see Slack Channel and

## Target Release

1.7.0

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the feature is working as expected:
```bash
tofu version
tofu validate
tofu plan
```
Confirm that the feature described in "Implement State Encryption" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:

- configuration handling
- external interface and top-level functions to allow parallelization of the development effort

Specification and approved RFC see #874

prerequisites.description: OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration.
